text: Anaal Nathrakh originated from Birmingham, England in the early 1990s. The group's name is derived from the Hebrew words for 'Covenant of the Fireflies' or alternatively 'Covenant of the Fiery Ones.' This moniker reflects the band's extreme and uncompromising approach to black metal, with vocalist V.I.T.R.I.O.L. and guitarist Irrumator at the helm.
